---
title: "Education"
format: html
css: education.css
---

<div class="education-section">

<!-- MSc Forensic Phonetics -->
<div class="edu-card">
  <div class="edu-duration">Sep 2022 – Oct 2023</div>
  <h3 class="edu-degree">MSc Forensic Phonetics</h3>
  <p class="edu-institute">University of York, UK</p>
  <p class="edu-details"><em>Awaiting Graduation</em></p>
</div>

<!-- MPhil Linguistics -->
<div class="edu-card">
  <div class="edu-duration">Sep 2018 – Jun 2020</div>
  <h3 class="edu-degree">MPhil Linguistics</h3>
  <p class="edu-institute">University of Kerala, India</p>
</div>

<!-- MA Linguistics -->
<div class="edu-card">
  <div class="edu-duration">Aug 2013 – Apr 2016</div>
  <h3 class="edu-degree">MA Linguistics</h3>
  <p class="edu-institute">University of Kerala, India</p>
</div>

<!-- BSc Chemistry -->
<div class="edu-card">
  <div class="edu-duration">Jun 2010 – Apr 2013</div>
  <h3 class="edu-degree">BSc Chemistry</h3>
  <p class="edu-institute">University of Calicut, India</p>
</div>

</div>
